---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a problem with an existing skill
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Skill Name

Which skill has the issue? (e.g., `track-session`, `git-worktree`)

## Describe the Bug

A clear description of what went wrong.

## Trigger Used

What phrase or command activated (or failed to activate) the skill?

```
Example: "/track-session resume" or "I want to track my progress"
```

## Expected Behavior

What should have happened?

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened?

## Agent Environment

- **AI Agent:** (e.g., Claude Code, Cursor, Cline)
- **SkillBox version:** (e.g., v1.6.0 or commit hash)

## Additional Context

Paste relevant SKILL.md frontmatter or agent output if helpful.
